goal: ker.carrier = full.carrier and forall(x0: M) { ker.contains(x0) = full.contains(x0) }
proof: let w0: M satisfy { w0 ∈ full != w0 ∈ ker }

goal: module_hom_kernel[R, M, N](module_hom_trivial[R, M, N](src, dst)) = full_submodule[R, M](src)
img.carrier = z.carrier and forall(x0: N) { img.contains(x0) = z.contains(x0) }
proof: let w0: N satisfy { w0 ∈ z != w0 ∈ img }

goal: module_hom_image[R, M, N](module_hom_trivial[R, M, N](src, dst)) = zero_submodule[R, N](dst)
